data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for check-in tracking, specifically to confirm who arrived and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, there is a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
